TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoderFrame extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, consisting of pixel data and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The bitmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The image providing the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an and a display duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an and a display duration.
Gets or sets the display duration for this animation frame.
Docs.value: The length of time this frame is shown during playback.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this animation frame.
Docs.value: The containing the pixel data to encode for this frame.
